untranslatable_reason: The signal requires tracking a '50-period uptrend line' (custom trendline) and detecting when RS 'breaks below' this line. The allowed indicators do not include custom trendline calculations or a generic 'RS indicator' — only RSI_14, RSI_7, and RSI_21 are available. The specific condition 'RS breaks 50-period uptrend line' cannot be expressed with the provided indicator set without custom trendline logic.
translation_notes: Entry approximated using RSI_14 > 85 as a proxy for strong RS and an uptrend state. Exit condition simplified to RSI_14 crossing below 80. Industry rank filtering cannot be applied (no rank indicator available). The core momentum-deterioration concept is captured, but the precise 50-period trendline breakout requires custom trendline detection outside the allowed operator set.
